improvement_bullets: Developed time series models to identify high-value customer segments and utilized basic machine learning concepts to tune marketing initiatives, resulting in a 300% increase in new customer acquisition.
Engineered a PostgreSQL data model and ETL pipeline for lending risk analysis, ensuring clean, standardized data structures that support reliable AI and machine learning model evaluation.
Authorized to work in the United States; leveraged expertise in SQL, Python, and statistical analysis to translate complex data requests into accessible narratives for stakeholders.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to integrate and clean insurance testing data, applying statistical methodologies to reconcile datasets and improve overall predictive accuracy.

Utilized advanced data storytelling and visualization techniques in Tableau to present demographic patterns and statistical insights to non-technical stakeholders, facilitating data-driven decision-making.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Data Analyst (New York) opportunity with Jobright.ai. I am interested in this opportunity because of Jobright’s mission to revolutionize career navigation through AI-driven insights. What interests me about working for Jobright.ai is its commitment to building AI agents that actively improve user outcomes, which intrigues me because of my passion for applying technical analysis to solve complex, real-world human challenges. I believe my hands-on experience in ETL pipeline development and my proficiency in data storytelling would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by focusing on the intersection of raw data and actionable strategy. In fact, while at Shine Masters, I identified a bottleneck in client onboarding and implemented automated workflows via Zapier that saved 8 hours per week, allowing the team to reallocate resources toward high-impact lead generation. Ultimately, I know that the Data Analyst role at Jobright.ai would allow me to bring my technical expertise in SQL and Python to the crucial responsibility of tuning and evaluating AI agents. Additionally, my role as a Data Analytics Fellow at COOP Careers enabled me to develop my statistical and machine learning modeling skills. I analyzed a 250K+ row dataset to uncover demographic patterns using Python and NumPy, resulting in a presentation that provided city stakeholders with actionable insights for safety initiatives. I am excited by the opportunity to use my background in data modeling in working on the development of AI agents at Jobright.ai. I know that my technical proficiency and communication skills align with what it takes to succeed at the Data Analyst role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
